pages.title: Ethereal Hive
pages.text: The Ethereal Hive is an advanced, player-made alternative to the natural nest. It is designed to house multiple Ethereal Bees and improve production efficiency. Compared to a nest, the hive offers a more controlled and reliable way to manage bee production. With enough bees inside, progress becomes faster and more rewarding.
Those who invest in proper hive management will gain a steady supply of rare honeycomb and nectar-related resources needed for deeper progression.
